brand.name: Gucci
brand.description: Italian luxury house founded in Florence in 1921. One of the most counterfeited designer brands and a high-volume authentication/discovery target; grouped in this catalog's thrift/authentication-focus tier (this is a catalog tiering choice, not a market-positioning statement). Known for the interlocking double-G motif and matelassé chevron GG Marmont line.

style.name: GG Marmont
style.closure_type: flap with double-G push closure (camera-bag versions use a top zip)
style.description: The GG Marmont matelassé line is Gucci's chevron-quilted leather collection introduced under former creative director Alessandro Michele around 2016. It centers on a softly structured flap shoulder bag with an antique-gold double-G logo closure and a heart-shaped matelassé detail on the back, plus a coordinating top-zip camera bag. Sold across several sizes (super mini, mini, small, medium) with a sliding chain-and-leather strap. The 'Marmont' name predates this line on other Gucci products, so 2016 refers specifically to the matelassé GG Marmont relaunch.
style.notes: year_introduced=2016 reflects the widely cited Alessandro Michele-era launch of the matelassé GG Marmont; flagged as approximate. All values here are sourced from search-result snippets (retailer listings and authentication blogs), not rendered pages or physical inspection, and require browser + in-hand verification before being treated as authoritative. Gucci does NOT use a decodable date code; authentication centers on the interior leather heat-stamp tag, the double-G hardware finish, and chevron/heart stitch detailing.

variants.size_label: GG Marmont Mini Matelasse Flap Shoulder Bag
variants.strap_type: sliding chain-and-leather strap (worn long as shoulder/crossbody or doubled as a top handle)
variants.strap_attachment_type: fixed sliding chain (length adjusts by sliding leather slider), not removable on flap versions
variants.authentication_markers: Matelassé chevron calfskin with antique gold double-G logo on the flap and a heart-shaped matelassé detail on the back near the bottom (the heart has a small tail). Mini dimensions commonly cited around W21-22cm x H14cm x D6cm. Sliding chain-and-leather strap. Interior leather heat-stamp tag carries the style number over a supplier number. Double-G should have a matte/aged bronze (not shiny/lacquered) finish; the left G tapers in and sits snug against the back of the right G.
variants.notes: Retail price left null: snippet sources only showed secondary-market prices, not a corroborated original Gucci retail figure. Mini dimensions vary slightly across retailer snippets (e.g. 8.5"x5"x2.5" / ~21.5x14x6cm). Snippet-sourced; verify in browser and in hand.

variants.size_label: GG Marmont Small Matelasse Flap Shoulder Bag
variants.strap_type: sliding chain-and-leather strap (worn long for shoulder/crossbody, ~55cm drop, or doubled as a top handle, ~30cm drop)
variants.strap_attachment_type: fixed sliding chain (length adjusts by sliding leather slider)
variants.authentication_markers: Matelassé chevron calfskin, antique gold double-G flap closure, heart-shaped matelassé detail on the back. Small dimensions commonly cited around W26cm x H15cm x D7cm. Sliding chain strap with ~55cm shoulder drop / ~30cm top-handle drop. Interior heat-stamp leather tag: style number over supplier number (small flap style code commonly cited as 443497). Style code alone does not authenticate.
variants.notes: Style code 443497 for the small flap appears across multiple resale listings but was not confirmed on gucci.com in this snippet-only pass; treat as commonly-cited, not verified. Retail price null (no corroborated original figure). Snippet-sourced; verify in browser and in hand.

variants.size_label: GG Marmont Medium Matelasse Flap Shoulder Bag
variants.strap_attachment_type: fixed sliding chain (length adjusts by sliding leather slider)
variants.authentication_markers: Matelassé chevron calfskin, antique gold double-G flap closure, heart-shaped matelassé detail on the back. Medium dimensions commonly cited around W30cm x H19cm x D7-8cm (retailer snippets vary). Interior heat-stamp leather tag: style number over supplier number (medium flap style code commonly cited as 443496).
variants.notes: Style code 443496 for the medium flap appears across resale listings but not confirmed on gucci.com here. Medium dimensions vary noticeably between snippets (some quote ~W12"); left as a cited range. Retail price null. Snippet-sourced; verify in browser and in hand.

variants.size_label: GG Marmont Matelasse Camera Bag (top-zip crossbody)
variants.hardware_type: top zip closure with antique gold double-G logo on the front
variants.authentication_markers: Boxier camera-bag shape with a top zip and a flat antique-gold double-G logo on the front face; chevron matelassé calfskin, chain-trimmed leather strap, faux-suede lining. Mini camera dimensions commonly cited around W18cm x H10.5cm x D6.5cm; small camera around ~9.5"W x 5"H x 3"D. Interior heat-stamp leather tag: style number over supplier number (small camera bag style code commonly cited as 447632).
variants.notes: Camera bag is a distinct silhouette (top zip, no front flap). Style code 447632 for the small camera bag appears in resale/eBay listings; not confirmed on gucci.com here. Dimensions vary by mini vs small; both ranges noted. Retail price null. Snippet-sourced; verify in browser and in hand.

production_records.hardware_vendor_notes: Antique gold-toned double-G logo; should feel like a matte/aged bronze, not varnished or lacquered.
production_records.date_code_format: Gucci does NOT use a decodable month/year date code. Production timing cannot be decoded from the tag. Bags from roughly 2016 onward typically also have a separate fabric care/QR tag.
production_records.stamp_placement: Interior leather heat-stamp tag (rectangular), typically near or behind the interior pocket; on small items the stamp may be applied directly to interior leather. Front bears 'GUCCI' over a style number, with 'made in Italy' and the ® symbol; the supplier number typically appears on the back of the tag.
production_records.stamp_font_notes: Heat stamp must be high-pressure, crisp, evenly spaced and of consistent depth; thin, tall, cleanly embossed serial font. Under magnification impressions should be sharp without bleeding/smudging. Snippet-level guidance; do not over-rely on single descriptions of specific digit shapes.
production_records.known_authentication_markers: Antique-gold double-G with the left G tapering inward and sitting snug against the back of the right G; Gs thicker in the middle with finer points at the tips. Heart-shaped matelassé detail sits toward the bottom of the back with a small tail. Chevron rows should align and feel deliberate. Snippet-sourced; verify in browser + in hand. Country of manufacture: Italy (Gucci is made in Italy), but country alone does not authenticate.

production_records.date_code_format: No decodable date code (Gucci-wide). Separate fabric QR/care tag common on ~2016+ production.
production_records.stamp_placement: Interior leather heat-stamp tag near the interior pocket: 'GUCCI' + ® over the style number, 'made in Italy' below; supplier/manufacturing number typically on the back of the tag.
production_records.stamp_font_notes: High-pressure clean heat stamp; thin, tall, evenly embossed serial digits with consistent depth.
production_records.known_authentication_markers: Small flap dimensions commonly cited ~W26 x H15 x D7cm. Sliding chain strap ~55cm shoulder drop / ~30cm top-handle drop. Style code commonly cited 443497. Antique-gold double-G finish and back heart detail as authentication checks. Snippet-sourced.

production_records.stamp_placement: Interior leather heat-stamp tag: 'GUCCI' + ® over style number, 'made in Italy' below; supplier number on the back of the tag.
production_records.stamp_font_notes: Crisp high-pressure heat stamp; clean, evenly embossed serial digits.
production_records.known_authentication_markers: Medium flap dimensions vary across snippets (~W30 x H19 x D7-8cm; some retailers quote larger). Style code commonly cited 443496. Same double-G finish and back heart-detail checks. Snippet-sourced; dimensions need confirmation.

production_records.hardware_vendor_notes: Antique gold-toned double-G logo on the front face; top zip pull.
production_records.stamp_placement: Interior leather heat-stamp tag: 'GUCCI' + ® over style number, 'made in Italy' below; supplier number typically on the back of the tag.
production_records.stamp_font_notes: Crisp high-pressure heat stamp; clean, evenly embossed serial digits.
production_records.known_authentication_markers: Top-zip camera silhouette, flat front double-G logo, chain-trimmed leather strap, faux-suede lining. Mini camera ~W18 x H10.5 x D6.5cm; small camera ~9.5"W x 5"H x 3"D. Small camera style code commonly cited 447632. Snippet-sourced.

known_color_combinations.authentication_notes: Classic black matelassé chevron calfskin. Interior lining color not stated in accessible snippets. Source: Saks OFF 5TH, Farfetch (snippet-level).
Classic neutral matelassé colorway. Source: 1stdibs cream/beige listings (snippet-level).
Recurring GG Marmont pastel colorway. Source: 1stdibs small shoulder pink listing (447632) (snippet-level).
Classic red matelassé. Source: Farfetch red small shoulder, Dallas Designer Handbags (snippet-level).
White/cream matelassé colorway. Source: 1stdibs cream listing (snippet-level).
Black matelassé on the mini flap. Source: Harvey Nichols mini, 1stdibs mini black (snippet-level).
Red matelassé mini camera bag. Source: Midtown Authentic mini camera red (snippet-level).
Black matelassé camera bag. Source: Net-A-Porter, Harvey Nichols (snippet-level).

carry_methods.notes: Flap versions use a sliding chain-and-leather strap worn long for crossbody/shoulder, commonly cited ~55cm drop; length adjusts by sliding the leather slider. Camera bag uses an adjustable chain-trimmed leather strap. Snippet-sourced.
Same sliding chain strap worn on the shoulder. Snippet-sourced.
On flap versions the chain can be doubled/shortened to a top-handle drop commonly cited ~30cm. Snippet-sourced.

fits.notes: Mini fits a phone, small wallet/cardholder, keys and lipstick, but reviewers note a large phone (e.g. iPhone XS Max) does not fit comfortably. Source: Mia Mia Mine, Ella Pretty Blog, Style of Sam.
Mini holds a card case or small wallet; a small wallet plus a phone leaves little room for extras. Source: Style of Sam, Mia Mia Mine.
Fits among the essentials. Source: Ella Pretty Blog, Style of Sam.
Reviewers describe the small flap as 'surprisingly spacious' for phone, small wallet, keys and lipstick. Source: Pretty Little Details, Le Travel Style.

interior_storage.placement: interior (flap versions typically have a single interior slip pocket)
interior_storage.authentication_notes: Flap GG Marmont interiors are typically lined in faux suede/microfiber with a single interior slip pocket. Exact pocket count varies by size; snippet-sourced.

serial_tags.format: Interior leather heat-stamp tag. Front: 'GUCCI' (with ® registered-trademark symbol) over a style/model number, with 'made in Italy' below. Back of the tag: a separate supplier/manufacturing number. Combined digits commonly total roughly 10-13. NOT a decodable date code -- the numbers identify model and supplier, not a production month/year.
serial_tags.placement: Rectangular leather tag inside the bag, typically near or attached behind the interior pocket; on very small pieces the stamp may be applied directly onto interior leather. A separate fabric care/QR tag is also common on ~2016+ production.
serial_tags.how_to_read: Front first number = style/model number (any bag of the same model shares the same leading style digits; small flap commonly cited 443497, medium flap 443496, small camera bag 447632); the number on the back = supplier/manufacturing code. The style number should match the catalogued code for the identified model. Do NOT attempt to decode a production date -- Gucci does not encode one.
serial_tags.authentication_notes: Heat stamp must be high-pressure, crisp, and consistent in depth with a thin, tall, evenly embossed font; blurry, shallow, or unevenly spaced stamping is a red flag. 'made in Italy' must be correctly spelled and lowercase with the ® present. Style code alone does not authenticate (codes are widely copied onto fakes). Modeled as tag_type 'serial number' (closest schema match); this is NOT a Coach-style creed stamp and Gucci does not use a decodable date code. Snippet-sourced; needs browser + physical verification.

locks_and_keys.authentication_notes: The GG Marmont closes with a double-G flap push closure (flap versions) or a top zip (camera bag). It does not ship with a separate padlock-and-key set. A padlock/key on a GG Marmont would be inconsistent with the style. Snippet-sourced.

provenance_packaging.description: White/off-white Gucci dust bag with a black rectangle and 'GUCCI' lettering inside it; drawstring at both top corners. Should feel silky/smooth, never wrapped in plastic.
provenance_packaging.material: Silky woven fabric (described as silk-like in authentication guides)
provenance_packaging.branding: Black rectangle with 'GUCCI'; an inner tag reading 'Gucci Made in Italy' is described in guides
provenance_packaging.authentication_notes: Dust bag presence does not by itself authenticate; a genuine bag is never shipped wrapped in plastic. Specific current dust-bag design not independently confirmed beyond snippet descriptions.

provenance_packaging.description: Controllato card included with new Gucci bags. 'Controllato' is Italian for 'checked', indicating the bag passed Gucci's quality/authenticity control. Newer bags (c.2016+) are also associated with a QR code element.
provenance_packaging.format_by_year: QR-code-associated authentication elements cited for ~2016+ production; a missing QR/card does not by itself prove a fake.
provenance_packaging.authentication_notes: Controllato card and any QR element support but do not alone prove authenticity. Snippet-sourced.

provenance_packaging.description: Gucci branded box typically included with new purchase.
provenance_packaging.authentication_notes: Box presence does not authenticate. Specific box design not independently confirmed in this snippet-only pass.
